description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build and test using the node:16-alpine Docker image. In the build stage add a build job that runs `apk add yarn` then `yarn install` and uses an untracked cache with pull policy. In the test stage add separate jobs for each timezone (Africa/Johannesburg, America/Los_Angeles, America/New_York, America/Santiago, Asia/Jakarta, Asia/Shanghai, Australia/Melbourne, Europe/London, UTC) that each run `TZ='<zone>' yarn test:moment-tz-date-adapter` with the same cache settings. Also add test jobs named core, dayjs_date_adapter, joda_date_adapter, luxon_date_adapter, moment_date_adapter, recurrence_rules_resolver, and standard_date_adapter that each run `TZ='America/Los_Angeles' yarn test:<job-name>` using node:16-alpine and a pull‑policy untracked cache, with no artifacts, services, or conditional rules.
